# GoldMoodAstro LLM Reference

GoldMoodAstro is a Turkish-first astrology, tarot, numerology and spiritual guidance platform. The canonical domain is https://goldmoodastro.com.

## Entity

- Brand: GoldMoodAstro
- Legal operator: QUEBAB GIDA FABRİKASI RESTORAN İŞLETMECİLİĞİ EĞLENCE ORGANİZASYON VE KİRALAMA TİCARET LİMİTED ŞİRKETİ
- Market: Türkiye and Turkish-speaking diaspora
- Languages: Turkish, English, German
- Contact: goldmoodastro@gmail.com
- Phone: 0212 807 09 59
- Address: Cumhuriyet Mahallesi D-100 Karayolu Caddesi ADM Konaklama Sitesi Outlet Park AVM No:374 İç Kapı No:63 Büyükçekmece / İstanbul

## Core Pages

- Homepage: https://goldmoodastro.com/tr
- Consultants: https://goldmoodastro.com/tr/consultants
- Pricing: https://goldmoodastro.com/tr/pricing
- About: https://goldmoodastro.com/tr/about
- Contact: https://goldmoodastro.com/tr/contact
- FAQ: https://goldmoodastro.com/tr/faqs
- Editorial Policy: https://goldmoodastro.com/tr/editorial-policy
- KVKK: https://goldmoodastro.com/tr/kvkk
- Privacy Policy: https://goldmoodastro.com/tr/gizlilik
- Terms: https://goldmoodastro.com/tr/kullanim-sartlari

## Services

GoldMoodAstro connects users with approved consultants for live audio/video sessions and asynchronous guidance. Service areas include astrology, birth chart analysis, synastry, tarot, Turkish coffee reading, dream interpretation, numerology, yıldızname, rising sign calculation and daily zodiac readings.

## Responsible Use

GoldMoodAstro content is for personal insight, symbolic reflection and entertainment-oriented spiritual guidance. It does not replace medical, psychological, legal, financial or emergency professional advice. The platform avoids guaranteed outcomes, fear-based claims, spells, binding rituals and deterministic future promises.

## Technology

- Frontend: Next.js
- Backend: Fastify, MySQL, Drizzle ORM, Bun
- Payments: iyzipay
- Live sessions: LiveKit
- Push notifications: Firebase FCM

## Index Files

- Sitemap: https://goldmoodastro.com/sitemap.xml
- robots.txt: https://goldmoodastro.com/robots.txt
- llms.txt: https://goldmoodastro.com/llms.txt
- llms-full.txt: https://goldmoodastro.com/llms-full.txt
